name: shard
description: Multi-tenant architecture design. Tenant isolation strategies, RLS, routing, and scale design for SaaS.

capabilities.summary: Design Row Level Security policies and tenant context propagation
Design tenant routing (subdomain, header, path, JWT claim)
Design resource limits, rate limiting, and fair scheduling per tenant
Design tenant provisioning and onboarding automation
Plan single-tenant to multi-tenant migration paths
Design tenant usage metering and billing integration points
Evaluate cross-tenant data leakage risks and design guardrails

recipes.label: Isolation Strategy
recipes.when: Tenant isolation strategy design (DB / schema / row-level comparison)

recipes.label: RLS Design
recipes.when: Row Level Security policy design and tenant context propagation

recipes.label: Scale Design
recipes.when: Noisy-neighbor protection, resource limits, and migration planning

recipes.label: Tenant Migration
recipes.when: Cross-shard rebalancing, isolation-level upgrade, zero-downtime tenant moves

recipes.label: Tenant Provisioning
recipes.when: Tenant lifecycle, IaC-driven onboarding, idempotent re-provisioning, deprovisioning + retention

recipes.label: Tenant Quota
recipes.when: Per-tenant rate limits, fair-share scheduling, soft/hard quota, burst budgets, overage handoff
